overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Moderate Buffer ETF - March (GMAR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust over a one-year period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. GMAR was launched on Mar 17, 2023 and is issued by First Trust.
